videos.headline: Boise State's fake-FG attempt foiled by San Jose State defense
videos.description: Boise State attempt a trick play on their field goal attempt, only for San Jose State's defense to force a turnover on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Boise State's fake-FG attempt foiled by San Jose State defense) 2024/11/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ashton Jeanty punches Boise State level with 24th TD of season
videos.description: Ashton Jeanty will not be denied as he powers into the end zone to bring Boise State level vs. San Jose State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ashton Jeanty punches Boise State level with 24th TD of season) 2024/11/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeanty notches 25th TD of the year, strikes Heisman pose
videos.description: Ashton Jeanty hits the Heisman celly after becoming the first player since 1998 to have 25 rushing touchdowns in the first 10 games of the season.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeanty notches 25th TD of the year, strikes Heisman pose) 2024/11/17 ESHEET
